title: Export Your Entity-Relationship Diagram from Atlas

sections.heading: Before You Export Your Entity-Relationship Diagram
sections.body:
Before you export your schema visualization, ensure you
[Data Model Visualization](atlas-ui-data-modeling).

sections.heading: Step 1: Open the  tab.
sections.body: In the left sidebar, click Diagram **Data Modeling**.

sections.heading: Step 3: Open the  modal.
sections.body:
In the upper-right corner of your diagram view, click the export
Export icon.

sections.heading: Step 4: Select your export file format.
sections.body: After you select the file format, click **Export**.

sections.heading: Step 5: Save your exported file.
sections.body:
Select the location on your filesystem to save your exported
file.
